prompt: Create a warm, realistic nighttime lifestyle photo in a small apartment bedroom: an adult person with medium brown hair lies asleep on their side on a white bed, face intentionally covered by a solid square privacy censor block, wearing a white sleeveless tank top and dark navy shorts. In the foreground beside their arm, an orange tabby cat named Kinako sleeps curled on the bed, its head resting near the person’s relaxed hand. Add one paperback book lying face-up near the person’s hip on the wrinkled white bedding. The room should feel cozy and quiet after a long day, lit by one warm bedside lamp on the left. Background details: beige textured wall, white pillow, tall window with sheer curtains and heavier beige drapes, a small bookshelf on the right with books and small objects, and a wall-mounted air conditioner near the ceiling. Use portrait orientation, natural smartphone-photo framing, soft shadows, warm indoor color temperature, realistic fabric wrinkles, shallow but believable depth of field, no visible text overlays, no watermark.
